ignoreCommand: if [ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" != "main" ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cloud.umami.is; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; frame-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' https://cloud.umami.is
